payload.notes: Repository owner authorized the simpler gate. Initial release should not be blocked on Windows; Windows remains unsupported until install mutation works.
payload.summary: Simplify the V1 release gate: remove mandatory dogfood, use normal PR approval, retain automated release provenance, and claim only platforms with successful native mutation smoke proof

payload.notes: Supersedes Decision 0017 release-gate requirements; dogfood and separate review evidence are optional; Windows install remains unsupported.
payload.predicted_impact: V1 release requires only premerge, four supported Unix platform smokes, ordinary PR approval, and CI artifacts/checksums/attestations for owner testing.
payload.title: Minimal V1 Release Gate

payload.actions_taken: ["fixed bootstrap ownership false positive","recorded Decision 0018","removed mandatory dogfood","kept ordinary PR approval and CI attestations","documented four supported Unix targets","kept Windows controlled unsupported","ran focused and workspace validation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["Decision 0018 supersedes Decision 0017 release gates","dogfood is optional","ordinary PR approval is sufficient","CI binaries checksums and attestations remain required","macOS and Linux are initially supported","Windows installation remains unsupported"]
payload.errors: ["bootstrap initially false-positive matched a reference to Symphony","full premerge first stopped on a stale five-platform wording assertion; focused corrected suites subsequently passed","the external Phase 5 trust registry was not available for one uninterrupted local premerge run"]
payload.harness_friction: The durable database story ID US-113 belongs to unrelated Phase 0-R1 work while refactor docs reused US-113; the unrelated story row was intentionally not modified.
payload.notes: Detailed trace required because this removes a validation requirement. Full workspace tests, Phase 1-4 verifiers, focused release workflow tests, docs contracts, coherence, and revision checks passed.
payload.task_summary: Simplified and validated the minimal V1 release gate

payload.description: Repository owner rejected mandatory dogfood, special independent-review ceremony, and a separate production-provenance process as unnecessary release complexity.
payload.impact: Decision 0018 now uses ordinary PR approval, four supported Unix platform smokes, and CI-produced downloadable binaries, checksums, and attestations for optional owner testing before explicit publication.
